title: vicia iranica
intro: Vicia iranica, also known as Iranian vetch, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia iranica include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Vicia iranica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
